statusNote: Eskom status page is currently unreachable. Load shedding has been suspended since 26 March 2024. Check loadshedding.eskom.co.za for live status.

alerts.title: Transformer Fault — Soweto
alerts.description: A transformer fault at the Dobsonville substation is causing unplanned outages across parts of Soweto. Eskom crews are on site.

alerts.title: Substation Overload — Mitchells Plain
alerts.description: High demand causing overload at the Mitchells Plain substation. Rotating supply interruptions in affected areas until load normalises.

alerts.title: Cable Fault — Pinetown
alerts.description: Underground cable fault detected on the Pinetown feeder line. Affected customers are without supply while repairs are carried out.

alerts.title: Planned Maintenance — Gqeberha
alerts.description: Scheduled maintenance on the 132kV line supplying Gqeberha Central. Supply will be interrupted during the maintenance window.
